result: Data cleaning completed successfully. The R script loaded all 9 wave files from data/input/, merged them using full_join by NSID, harmonized missing value codes to standard codes (-9=Refusal, -8=Don't know, -1=Not applicable, -3=Not asked), created a consolidated sex variable prioritizing most recent valid responses, and output the cleaned data to data/output/cleaned_data.csv. The final dataset contains 16,111 observations with 2 variables (NSID and sex). Sex distribution: 8,150 Male, 7,820 Female, 141 Not asked.
